steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The sentence establishes that regulatory oversight exists at the Stock Exchange of Thailand.

The signal is what comes next: the word thereby and the logical consequence — “allow them to instead focus on identifying sound business opportunities.” This means knowing about regulatory oversight should have the effect of reducing investor concerns so they can shift their focus.

The blank must describe an action that calms or eases worries.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Assuage means to calm or reduce concerns — the precise action needed when investors learn about regulatory oversight.

The other choices either describe unrelated actions (designate, convey) or contradict the logic (amplify would strengthen worries, not diminish them).

The passage requires a word that eases investor anxiety about bureaucracy so they can refocus on business analysis.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
